description:
A free file archiver utility and rar extractor.


PeaZip 11.1.0 improves direct extraction from app's file manager, overhauling the "Extract to..." context menu group, with addition of last output path, and Bookmarks, Filesystem, and History submenus.
This release is focused on QOL enhancements and security fixes.
Backend are updated to 7z/p7zip 26.01, non-Windows alternative 7z/p7zip updated to Tino Reichardt's 7-Zip ZS 25.01, and Pea 1.31.
Sources are compiled with Lazarus 4.x, and are still compatible with Lazarus 3.x and 2.x.
11 1screen The new, extended, Extract to menu branch.
